title: F-Tech: Equipment
description: Adds a new backpack with upgrades, and robotic arms!
body: **F-Tech: Equipment** is part of the F-Tech series. This mod brings a high-tech backpack to your world with different upgrades you can use. The backpack can store 1k items on its own, with storage upgrades of 3 tiers: +500, +1,000, and +2,000. There are 9 slots total for upgrades, so you can prioritise what upgrades are important to you. There is also the Block Operations upgrade. This is what enables the robot arms to place and mine blocks. They do this by replicating what the player does in a range around the crosshair. Block placing requires that block to be in the backpack, and mining requires drills in the backpack drill slots. Drills can be enchanted like a pickaxe. The max range of the selection area for replication can be increased using an upgrade. There is also an Item Pickup upgrade that enables the robot arms to pick up nearby dropped items. **Default keybinds** *(These can be changed in settings)* - Open backpack **[B]** - Open replication screen **[U]** - Toggle replication **[Unbound]** - Toggle item pickup **[Unbound]**
